title: Favourites Selection Strong Scented Wax Melts 16 Pack - The Gift for Every Occasion – 4 of Our Favourite Scents - Fresh Linen, Baby Powder, Lime, Basil and Mandarin, Sandalwood Spa
features: Favourites Selection Wax Melts: A mix of four of our customers favourite wax melts strong scented including Baby Powder wax melts (4 pcs), Fresh Linen wax melts (4 pcs), Lime Basil and Mandarin wax melts (4 pcs) and Sandalwood Spa wax melts (4pcs).

Highly Fragranced and Long Lasting: One of our strong scented wax melts on average lasts up to 6 or more hours (this can vary depending on your burner type and tealight size) as they are highly concentrated in scent.

Eco Friendly Packaging: We believe it’s more important than ever to be wary of plastic usage and excess packaging, as we move towards a more sustainable future. That’s why all our wax melts scented are packed by hand in recyclable cardboard boxes.

Cruelty Free and Vegan Wax Melts: Making vegan wax melts that have not been tested on animals is a massive priority to us, so everything that goes into our wax melts from the dye to the fragrance is completely vegan friendly.

The Perfect Gift: When you buy a box of our hand packed scented wax melts not only are you supporting a UK based family run business, but they also make the perfect gifts for women, birthday gifts for her, wedding gifts, candles gifts for women, teacher gifts and hamper gifts.
description: Product Description Small UK Business - Top Selling Wax Melts - Loved by Thousands Dont let your nose settle for mediocrity! Our incredible wax melts will relax and uplift you. Try out our range of home fragrances, we stock strong scented wax melts, & long lasting reed diffusers. Take advantage of Amazon Prime's next day shipping options today. A Wax-trordinary Selection... Lime Basil Mandarin Wax Melts Mandarin, Lemon, Lime. Basil, Thyme. Lemongrass, Spearmint. Fresh Linen Wax Melts Citrus, Galbanum. Orange Blossom, Jasmine. Lily, Amber. Baby Powder Wax Melts Clean Cotton, Orange Peel. Jasmine, Geranium. Vanilla. Sandalwood Spa Wax Melts Vanilla, Sandalwood. Jasmine, Tonka. Sweet Orange, Grapefruit. It's About You Make your Home Smell Beautiful Everything we do is based around transforming your home, a good fragrance can lift the mood, relieve stress and calm you down after a hard day. That's where we come in. Our long lasting fragrances have been especially formulated for longevity and strength, giving you the option to break them in half to make a more subtle scent, and make the box last longer, or simply keep them as they are for a strong scent. Our wax melts are best in a tealight burner or high quality electric burner. The Perfect 'I Love You' A Extra Special Gift Transform your loved ones home by gifting a box of lovely wax melts. For an extra special treat, try one of our lovely reed diffusers, guaranteed to impress. Our hand made fragrances are perfect for when you need to express your love for someone, whether that be a family member, or friend, or a show of appreciation for a work colleague. Sustainable Home Fragrance Hand Made By Us In The UK Immerse yourself in sustainable fragrance experiences. We understand that scent can uplift and inspire, but we believe it shouldn't come at the expense of the environment. That's why our plastic-free wax melts are carefully crafted from sustainable ingredients , such as soy and rapeseed wax. Favourites Selection Wax Melts Technical Specifications Material A combination of house blended natural waxes Fragrances Baby Powder, Fresh Linen, Lime Basil & Mandarin, Sandalwood Spa Burn Time 6 hours per melt, 96 hours per box Burner types Tealight is preferable with our wax melts. High quality electric burners are more subtle but do work well provided they get hot enough. Gifting Occations Christmas, Birthdays, Tree Presents, Stocking fillers, Secret Santa, Wedding gifts, Baby Shower Gifts, Hamper Gifts & More! Country of Origin United Kingdom - England - Warwickshire - Alcester Packaging Plastic-free. Cardboard sourced from certified Bcorp Organisation.
